title: Adult mouse testis cell dissociation (on ice)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cp5ln","text":"This protocol is used to dissociate adult (8-10 week) mouse testis into a single cell suspension. The entire procedure is carried out 'on ice', reducing artifact gene expression changes.  The yield is 5.4 million cells from 25 mg tissue and the viability is ~99%. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines:
{"blocks":[{"key":"8ef18","text":"Reagents","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":8},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":8}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"46frf","text":"Collagenase Type 4 – Worthington (LS004186)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2t837","text":"Soybean Trypsin Inhibitor – Roche (10109886001) - 100 µL aliquots of 1 mg/mL made up in DPBS.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3bi44","text":"DNAse - Applichem (A3778) - 10 µL aliquots in DPBS each with 250 U","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"166ua","text":"DPBS (no Ca, no Mg) - ThermoFisher (14190144)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"f8fd9","text":"Bovine Serum Albumin - Sigma (A8806)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8cpv8","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8u3no","text":"Collagenase Enzyme Mix (1 mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":29},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":29}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"5jm5u","text":"10 mg Coll. Type 4","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"brj48","text":"100 µL of 1 mg/mL Soybean Trypsin Inhibitor (100 µg)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2hdmn","text":"5 µl Dnase I (125 U/mL)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"c49tk","text":"895µl DPBS ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1qguv","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"9e1a6","text":"Equipment","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9},{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"alsla","text":"gentleMACS dissociator (130-093-235) + gentleMACS C-tubes (130-093-237)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"d6qah","text":"Centrifuge for 1.5 mL, 15 mL conicals
 Pipettes and pipet tips
 15, 50 ml Conicals (MLS)
 1.5 mL tubes (MLS)
 30 µM filters - Miltenyi (130-098-458) 
 Petri dishes (MLS)
 Razor blades (MLS)
 Ice bucket w/ice
 Hemocytometers - InCyto Neubauer Improved (DHC-NO1-5)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ep0ur","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mince tissue with sterile razor blade on petri dish on ice.
Add 25 mg minced testis tissue to 1 mL enzyme solution on ice in 1.5 mL tube. undetermined, minced testis tissue
While incubating on ice, triturate 10x every two minutes for 10 minutes total time, using p1000 pipet set to 700 µL. 00:10:00, incubate on ice 00:02:00, triturate 10X
After 10 mins transfer the solution to miltenyi C tube.
Run program brain_03 twice (in 4 °C cold room). Undetermined, run brain_03 twice
Quick spin C tube to ensure contents go to the bottom of the tube.
Continue trituating on ice in C-tube 10x every two minutes for 12 additional minutes (25 minutes total time). 00:12:00, incubate on ice 00:02:00, triturate 10X
After 25 total minutes add digest mix to 30 µm filter on sterile 15mL conical tube on ice and rinse filter with 3 mL ice-cold 10% FBS/PBS.
Spin at 500g for 5 min at 4 °C. 00:05:00, spin 500 g
Discard supernatant and resuspend in 10 mL ice-cold 0.04% BSA/PBS. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA
Spin at 500g for 5 min at 4 ° C. 00:05:00, spin at 500 g
Discard supernatant and re-suspend in 200 µL ice-cold 0.04% BSA/PBS. undetermined, ice cold PBS/BSA
Analyze using hemocytometer with trypan blue. Adjust to concentration needed for 1,000 cells/µl for Chromium or 100 cells/µl for Drop-seq.
creator: Andrew Potter
